Item.name: Crates
Item.desc:
It's what all the kids want this holiday season: CRATES!
Crates grant a bonus to the XP and Gold received from all Shops by .3%

Item.name: Sheep
Item.desc:
The sheep is cuddly and sweet!
The Sheep grants a bonus to the XP and Gold received from all Shops by .3% (500% Maximum)

Item.name: Treehouse
Item.desc:
Members only.
Treehouse grants a bonus to the XP and Gold received from all Shops by 4.7%

Item.name: Blue Doghouse
Item.desc:
This lovable puppy will keep a watchful eye over your Town.
The Blue Doghouse increases XP and Gold for all Shops by 4.25%

Item.name: Chicken Coop
Item.desc: Chicken Coops grant a bonus to the XP and Gold received from all Shops by 2.75%

Item.name: Lake
Item.desc: Give your villagers a vacation and let them fish in the Lake to earn Gold and XP. The Lake increases XP and Gold for all Shops by 5%

Item.name: Gabbo
Item.desc:
Everybody loves Gabbo!
Gabbo increases XP and Gold for all Shops by 10.5%

Item.name: Poochie
Item.desc:
Happy Dog!
Poochie grants a bonus to the XP and Gold received from all Shops by 0.4%

Item.name: Lily
Item.desc:
Lily needs a home!
Lily increases XP and Gold for all Shops by 25%
